meaning: adj.仁慈的,(为)慈善事业的,宽恕的
examples: He had set up two charitable trusts.
We are happy to donate to bona fide charitable causes.
Today there are many charitable organizations which specialize in helping the weary traveler.
In 2002, MyGoodDeed launched the day as a yearly tribute of charitable service.
Funding would come from a charitable trust he has established and from fees paid by guests.
